next_steps: Perform image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue mass for histopathology and immunohistochemistry (including CD1a, CD68, S100, and IgG4 staining).
Order molecular testing on tissue for BRAF V600E mutation.
Evaluate for diabetes insipidus with serum and urine osmolality and sodium levels.
Perform pituitary MRI to assess for infundibular or hypothalamic infiltration.
Review historical bone imaging (radiographs/CT) of the right distal radius fracture for evidence of osteosclerosis.
Initiate high-dose glucocorticoid therapy pending biopsy results to stabilize inflammatory symptoms.
